variables.name: daniels_wins_opoy
variables.description: Will Jayden Daniels be named the 2025-26 NFL Offensive Player of the Year?

variables.name: games_started_by_daniels
variables.description: The number of regular season games Jayden Daniels starts in the 2025-26 NFL season. A high number is a necessary precondition for winning.

variables.name: total_offensive_yards
variables.description: Jayden Daniels' combined total passing and rushing yards in the 2025-26 NFL regular season.

variables.name: total_touchdowns
variables.description: Jayden Daniels' combined total passing and rushing touchdowns in the 2025-26 NFL regular season.

variables.name: commanders_playoff_berth
variables.description: Will the Washington Commanders make the playoffs in the 2025-26 season? Team success is highly correlated with individual awards.

variables.name: more_riots_than_average
variables.description: Will the number of 'Riots' in Finland for the 30 days before {resolution_date} be greater than the 30-day average of 'Riots' over the 360 days preceding {forecast_due_date}?

variables.name: baseline_riot_average
variables.description: The 30-day average number of 'Riots' in Finland over the 360 days preceding {forecast_due_date}, calculated as (total riots in 360 days) / 12.

variables.name: riots_in_forecast_period
variables.description: The total number of 'Riots' in Finland during the 30 days leading up to {resolution_date}.

variables.name: protests_in_forecast_period
variables.description: The total number of 'Protests' in Finland during the 30 days leading up to {resolution_date}, as recorded by ACLED.

variables.name: major_political_controversy
variables.description: Will a major political controversy or policy (e.g., significant labor reforms, austerity measures, contentious immigration law) be a primary topic of public debate and media coverage in Finland during the forecast period?

variables.name: protest_surge_occurs
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Russia for the 30 days before the resolution date compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding the forecast due date?

variables.name: protest_threshold
variables.description: The specific number of 'Protests' in the 30-day resolution period required for the question to resolve positively. This is calculated as 10 * (1 + (Total Protests in 360 days preceding forecast_due_date / 12)).

variables.name: major_destabilizing_event
variables.description: Will a major political, military, or economic event occur in Russia during the forecast period that is widely expected to trigger mass public discontent (e.g., a new general mobilization, a significant military defeat, assassination of a major political figure, severe economic collapse)?

variables.name: state_repression_level
variables.description: The average severity and scope of state repression against dissent during the 30-day resolution period, on a scale of 1 (business as usual) to 10 (draconian crackdown, complete suppression of any public gathering).

variables.name: opposition_mobilization_capability
variables.description: The perceived capability of Russian opposition movements to organize and mobilize large-scale protests during the resolution period, on a scale of 1 (no capability) to 10 (highly effective and coordinated).

variables.name: more_battles_than_average
variables.description: Will the number of 'Battles' in eSwatini in the 30 days before the resolution date be greater than the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding the forecast due date?

variables.name: recent_battles_trend
variables.description: The total number of 'Battles' events in eSwatini in the 90 days immediately preceding the forecast period.

variables.name: preceding_unrest_events
variables.description: The total number of 'Protests' and 'Riots' events in eSwatini in the 30 days immediately preceding the forecast period.

variables.name: significant_political_date
variables.description: Does the 30-day forecast period contain a major national election, a significant political anniversary (e.g., 2021 pro-democracy protests), or a major planned political gathering?

variables.name: regional_instability_spillover
variables.description: Is there a significant increase in violent conflict or military activity in neighboring regions of South Africa or Mozambique (e.g., KwaZulu-Natal, Mpumalanga, Maputo Province) in the 90 days preceding the forecast period?

variables.name: is_spike_over_10x
variables.description: Will the number of 'Strategic developments' in the Czech Republic in the 30 days before the resolution date be more than ten times the threshold value (one plus the 30-day average from the 360 days preceding the forecast due date)?

variables.name: target_period_developments
variables.description: The total number of 'Strategic developments' events recorded by ACLED in the Czech Republic in the 30 days prior to the resolution date.

variables.name: baseline_value_threshold
variables.description: The calculated threshold value which the number of 'Strategic developments' in the target period must exceed. This is calculated as: 10 * (1 + [30-day average of 'Strategic developments' over the 360 days preceding the forecast date]).

variables.name: major_regional_security_escalation
variables.description: Will there be a major escalation in the conflict in Ukraine or another regional security crisis that directly prompts a national security response from the Czech government (e.g., troop mobilization, state of emergency) during the target period?

variables.name: czech_government_crisis
variables.description: Will the Czech government face a formal no-confidence vote, or will the Prime Minister resign or be dismissed, leading to a significant cabinet crisis during the target period?

variables.name: protest_and_riot_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Protest' and 'Riot' events recorded by ACLED in the Czech Republic in the 60 days prior to the target period, as an indicator of social unrest.

variables.name: battle_spike_occurs
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Belarus for the 30 days before the resolution date compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding the forecast due date?

variables.name: historical_battle_average
variables.description: The 30-day average of 'Battles' in Belarus over the 360 days preceding the forecast due date. This value determines the threshold for a positive resolution.

variables.name: belarus_joins_ukraine_war
variables.description: Will the armed forces of Belarus be formally and overtly deployed in direct combat operations against Ukraine during the forecast period?

variables.name: russian_troop_buildup
variables.description: The peak number of Russian military personnel stationed in Belarus during the forecast period.

variables.name: ukrainian_strikes_in_belarus
variables.description: The total number of confirmed Ukrainian military strikes (e.g., drone, missile, artillery) on targets within Belarusian territory during the forecast period.
